title: Agentic LLMs: RAG, Tool Calling, and Agents (Stanford CME295, Lecture 7)
description: A walkthrough of Stanford CME295 Lecture 7 (Afshine & Shervine Amidi) on agentic LLMs — RAG (chunking, embeddings, two-stage retrieval, BM25, reranking, metrics), tool/function calling and how to teach it, tool selection and MCP, the ReAct agent loop, agent-to-agent communication, and safety.
